title: Field Visit i2connect. Operational Group GO FAGUS
subtitle: Adding value to beech trees through innovation and improving the competitiveness of their forest industry value chain.
description: A field visit presentation for the GO FAGUS Operational Group under the i2connect interactive innovation initiative focused on valorising beech forests through management and technological innovation. It outlines the current status of Spanish beech forests, project objectives, planned activities and anticipated outputs to improve competitiveness and support the forest bioeconomy.
